sections.paragraph:
Original: בּלשׁאצּר

Transliteration: bêlsha'tstsar

Phonetic: bale-shats-tsar'

BDB Definition:

Belshazzar = "Bel protect the king"
  1. king of Babylon at the time of its fall; he to whom Daniel interpreted the writing on the wall

Origin: corresponding to H1112

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
